title: TMNT | Shell Shock
body:
Welcome to a new topic for minecraft mods, TMNT a.k.a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. I added tmnt to minecraft for a cool fighting expierences like attacking the ninjas and enemies like sherdders minions, and sherdder himself! be sure to let me know for bugs or any problems **in the beta there will be no blocks added or enemies!**![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/879054f738c158b000026be642af44c2523dcfcb.png)
by the Way Enemies will be added in 1.0.1
